# PERF-226 positive: make+copy immediately after Bytes()
lang: go
file: PERF-226-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "bytes"

func Encode(payload []byte) []byte {
	var buf bytes.Buffer
	buf.Write(payload)
	out := buf.Bytes()
	cp := make([]byte, len(out))
	copy(cp, out)
	return cp
}
